rationale: Option A (LLM prompt parses events.jsonl to find the last action_complete event for prev.state) reproduces this bug's own confabulation risk: action_complete events carry no state key and retries emit multiple entries per state in an append-only log, so *no* existing loop YAML asks a prompt to do this correlation. Option B's capture mechanism is deterministic and already unit-tested. Scores: A=3/12, B=6/12.
rule: Option B: add capture: to the 8 diagnose on_error source states, reference ${captured.<name>.stderr} in the diagnose prompt
alternatives_rejected: Option A: single-state change reading ${context.run_dir}/events.jsonl for stderr_preview; scored 3/12 due to no non-LLM evaluator and ambiguous last-event-for-state correlation under retries
